title: Creamy Adventure
description: Experience an amazing adventure with 100+ mods including many adventure based mods.
body:
Experience an amazing adventure in this modpack!
This pack includes adventure based mods like
- Advent of Ascension
- Chaos Awakens
- Divine RPG
- Oh the biomes youll go
- And many structure mods so you have many to explore

Discover new weapons and armour with extra enhancments (like flight!) with mystical agriculture.

Xaero's minimap will help you with waypoints and getting around this world full of adventure.

Enchant your tools above the regular limit with Tool leveling +

And many more adventures in this modpack.
